name: Talaris Therapeutics, Inc. Common Stock
summary: Talaris Therapeutics, Inc. (formerly Selecta Biosciences, Inc.) is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing cell therapies with the goal of eliminating the need for chronic immunosuppression in patients with life-threatening disorders. Their investigational therapy, FCR001, is being developed for severe autoimmune and metabolic diseases, as well as organ and cell transplantation. The company is headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts.
